2258100.name: Bloodlust&mercy
2258100.description: Bloodlust&mercy is an action RPG game that will feature a campaign creator, a single-player campaign, other games such as a team battle, and an MMO RPG. Bloodlust&mercy combat will be a mix of soul-like, first-person shooter, and magic. most weapons like swords, volley guns, and meteor hammers will be based around their real-life counterparts to make combat more fun. Magic weapons like staffs and wands are going to base on string and particle physics to make them more balanced and realistic. The campaign creator will allow you to make your own maps, dungeons, and stories.
2258100.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
